preprocessing_steps.Description: analog bandpass filter, lowpass filter, downsampling, artifact rejection

TaskDescription: [auditory ERP speller] Nine-class auditory ERP paradigm with predictive text entry system (PASS2D). Users focus attention on two-dimensional auditory stimuli varying in pitch (high/medium/low) and direction (left/middle/right) presented via headphones. ISI: 125.0ms, SOA: 225.0ms, stimulus frequencies: [708.0, 524.0, 380.0] Hz.
Instructions: Focus on target stimuli while ignoring all non-target stimuli. Minimize eye movements and muscle artifacts. Count targets during calibration. Spell sentences during online phase.
Description: A novel 9-class auditory ERP paradigm driving a predictive text entry system
